calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Murray (Wife). Maureen Murray Fox (Daughter).

Ms. Fox stated that she filed the petition, that she was just trying to help her Mother, and that her Mother is actually the petitioner. The Court addressed Nancy Murray and inquired if she wished to join the petition. Nancy Murray stated that she would like to join the petition. The Court stated that before it today is a Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage pursuant to CA Health & Safety Code 103450, that it does have the copy of the marriage certificate issued by the City & County of San Francisco, that it also has the photos from the wedding which were submitted with the petition, and that everthing submitted supports the petition. The Court then granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (granted subject to a written order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

*After the hearing, a proposed order granting the petition was submitted to the Court and was signed this date.
